sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10294" key="a)ntipare/ktasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρ-έκτᾰσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">interpenetration</tr_> of two or more bodies in <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρᾶσις,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.153</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
